text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm visiting a racecourse today to inspect it for
<chrname>.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I've heard the good news, Oguri! Looks like
they're having an event to mark the release of
your plushie! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Your family must be so proud of their little star!
I'd love to get the scoop on their heartwarming
reaction. When are they available for an
interview?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, my parents are back in my hometown, so—

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't mind talking over the phone! Sooo, if
you would just tell me your family's phone
number...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-their number? Um, it's zero—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Interview or not, asking for personal information
is unacceptable. As a member of the academy, I
can't stand idly by.
choice_data_list:
Please contact the academy if you have any
further questions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Huh, and who might you be? Th-that badge...
Haha, you must be from the academy, eh? Well,
I'll be on my way, then!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for saving me. I had a feeling that
reporter didn't have good intentions.
choice_data_list:
You should turn reporters down the second you
think it's suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But that reporter called me a star.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And he told me that stars have an obligation to
respond because that's what their fans would
want.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I thought if I refused to answer...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'd be letting everyone down. Is that not
true?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear she regards her fans highly... but that
makes what I'm about to say all the more
important.
choice_data_list: You need to be firm in turning them down.
You need to be firm in turning them down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: Your true fans care about you as well.
Your true fans care about you as well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Tome and Shige used to always tell
me I was their treasure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means I should protect myself... so I
can protect their treasure.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I see where you're coming from. I'll make
sure to refuse next time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I wonder if I'll really be able to do it properly,
though.
choice_data_list: If you can't do it yourself, ask an adult for help.
I'll teach you a special phrase.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, I'll do that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Then I'll be counting on you when the time comes.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The way you handled the conversation
earlier was very impressive. Plus, you just happen
to be from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... Could I ask for your help again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback by her frank request. Everything
she said is true, but...
choice_data_list: You're really straightforward... almost to a fault.
You're really straightforward... almost to a fault.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I've heard. My mom often praised me for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later on, I see Oguri Cap candidly asking other
adults in the academy various questions.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...A special phrase?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's... exactly what you told the reporter!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And the reporter ran off the second they heard
those words. Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she finishes speaking, a woman runs over
to us.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are, Oguri! About the plushie—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Please contact the academy regarding that
question!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Wait, what?! Weren't we scheduled to have a
meeting about manufacturing your plushie today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh. Yes, that's right... S-sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like it'll take a little more work before she
can use her special phrase properly.
